title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Documents
text:
# Documents Filter Document category wise
All District Profile Notification Plan Report
Documents | Title | Date | View / Download |
| Roads notified as one way from Bodhjung Chow. to Women’s College road from 9.30AM to 11.00AM and similarly from Women’s College to Bodhjung Chow. road from 5.00PM to 6.30PM. | 03/09/2019 | |
| Roads notified as one way from Post Office Chow. to Big-Bazar to Netaji Chow. from 8.00AM to 10.00PM. | 03/09/2019 | |
| Notification of Expert Group issued by the Revenue Department in connection with acquisition of additional land measuring 4.011 acres at mouja Charipara Sheet No.2/P & Badharghat Sheet No.5(2)/P,4(1)P,3(4)/P for construction of Agartala-Akhaura New Railway Line Project. | 23/08/2019 | |
| Acquisition of land measuring 4.011 acres at mouja Charipara Sheet No.2/P & Badharghat Sheet No.5(2)/P,4(1)P,3(4)/P Badharghat Tehsil under Sadar Sub-Division for construction of Agartala-Akhaura New Railway Line Project. | 22/08/2019 | |
| Election Commission of India regarding disqualification of Shri Sujit Mandal an Independent Candidate who contested in Assembly Election,2018 from 4-Barjala (SC) Assembly Constituency. | 09/08/2019 | |
| Acquisition of land measuring 0.790 acres for up-gradation of road from Central Road Extension via Madhya Pratapgarh & Dukli Bazar. | 03/08/2019 | |
| Acquisition of land measuring 1.203 acres for upgradation of road from Central Road Extension to Bye Pass road via Madhya Pratapgarh & Dukli Bazar. | 03/08/2019 | |
| 22 places declared as No parking Zones in Agartala City and 36 places where parking can be done under Motor Vehicles Act. | 05/08/2019 | |
| Purpose of Development of D.C Nagar Solid Waste Management Plant under AMC under Mohanpur Sub-Division in West Tripura District,mouja Debandra Chandra Nagar,Sheet No.5(1)P for land measuring 5.83 acres.
